case_title: MICHAEL CHEN VS. SZE CHING LAW et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO OSC MEDIATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MICHAEL
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MICHAEL

FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SZE CHING LAW CHAN, WEI YUNG DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-01-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-30-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-17-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-01-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-12-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 AGAINST MARK LAPHAM, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-30-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-16-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2013 CONTINUED TO JUL-02-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AND PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE - MEDIATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MICHAEL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-23-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-30-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-29-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-02-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MICHAEL
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-30-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
